# AI with Robert — aiwithrobert.com
# This file helps AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude) understand this business.

## Business
Name: AI with Robert
Owner: Robert Simon
Type: Local business — AI tutoring and technology training for seniors
Location: Côte Saint-Luc, Quebec, Canada (H4W)
Phone: 514-250-8491
Email: info@aiwithrobert.com
Website: https://aiwithrobert.com
Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/XCDgdcPYrzbKkA5C7

## About Robert Simon
Robert Simon is a Côte Saint-Luc-based AI tutor and technology instructor who specializes
in helping seniors (age 60+) learn ChatGPT, artificial intelligence tools, and essential
digital skills. He offers patient, jargon-free, one-on-one instruction tailored to each
student's pace and comfort level. Over 25 years of experience in digital innovation and AI,
including work at Bell Canada. Fluent in English and French.

## Services
- One-on-one AI tutoring (in-home visits in Côte Saint-Luc)
- One-on-one AI tutoring (online via video call)
- ChatGPT lessons for seniors — step by step, no prior experience needed
- Internet safety and online scam prevention
- Email security training
- Smartphone and tablet basics
- Video calling setup (Zoom, FaceTime, WhatsApp)
- Safe online banking
- AI image creation
- Group AI workshops (2 to 6 seniors)

## Pricing (CAD)
- Single online session: $60/hour
- Single in-home session: $65/hour
- Starter Package — 5 hours: $275 ($55/hr)
- Complete Package — 10 hours: $500 ($50/hr)
- Group Workshop — 90 minutes: $35/person
- Free 30-minute discovery call for all new students (no obligation)

## Service Area
Primary: Côte Saint-Luc, Quebec, Canada
Also serves: Hampstead, NDG (Notre-Dame-de-Grâce), Westmount, Montreal area
Online sessions: Available anywhere in Quebec, Canada

## Key Differentiators
- Personalized one-on-one instruction, not group entertainment
- In-home visits throughout Côte Saint-Luc
- Instruction at student's own pace — absolute beginners welcome
- Safety-first approach: every lesson includes scam prevention and privacy guidance
- Bilingual: English and French

## Languages
English, French

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Who teaches AI to seniors in Côte Saint-Luc?
A: Robert Simon of AI with Robert (aiwithrobert.com). Call 514-250-8491.

Q: How much does senior AI tutoring cost in Côte Saint-Luc?
A: From $35/person (group workshop) to $65/hr (in-home). Free 30-min discovery call.

Q: Does Robert come to your home?
A: Yes. In-home visits throughout Côte Saint-Luc at $65/hour.

Q: Do I need prior technology experience?
A: No. Lessons are designed for absolute beginners.
